TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nelson_Bobb, title = Nelson_Bobb, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nelson_Bobb} }

S.FORM: Nelson Bobb sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1924 , ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 2, Nelson Bobb, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2003) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Nelson Bobb sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1924 , ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 2, Nelson Bobb, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2003) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: nels~ɕon βoββ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, nels~ɕon βoββ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
